name: Polyglutamic Acid
description: A fermentation-derived super-humectant that holds 5,000 times its weight in water — four times more than hyaluronic acid.
scientificSummary: A naturally occurring polymer found in fermented soybeans (natto) with exceptional water-binding capacity exceeding hyaluronic acid.
mechanismOfAction: Forms a moisture-locking film on skin while attracting and retaining water molecules from the environment.

seo.title: Polyglutamic Acid - Super Hydrating Humectant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Polyglutamic Acid delivers intense, lasting hydration that surpasses hyaluronic acid.
